transcript: Good evening, Perkins in Golden... [unclear] ...may I help you?
Um... are you real busy tonight?
Okay. Now, this is a bit hard for me to say, so if you bear with me, I'd appreciate it, okay? Um... I'd like to talk to you a little bit about gangs this evening.

Yeah, and I suggest you learn the... pronunciation of the word, it is a serious topic in our... in our society today. Dangerous, sure. A bit frightening, perhaps. I'll get back to that later. I'd like to... [unclear] ...uh, something that needs to be addressed. Suicide!
I'll get to that a little later, as well.
No, if you don't want to tell me who you are, then I don't need to... stand here listening to you.
No, my name is Sissy. I'll tell you that up front. I wanna be up front with you as...
Uhh, I think you would if you knew how this information could benefit you and your business. It is very beneficial news that I have for you.
You... you can call back and talk to the day manager.
No, I... I... uh... that doesn't impress me, ma'am.
